title: Jramirez
compiled_truth: Jramirez is an external contact at [Othon](companies/othon). Over the corpus period (2001-07-02 to 2002-01-31), Jramirez sent 12 and received 34 emails, totalling 46 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dutch Quigley](people/dutch-quigley) (10), [Molnar Mark](people/molnar-mark) (7), [Crawford Kevin](people/crawford-kevin) (5), [Riches John](people/riches-john) (5), [Portele Jerry](people/portele-jerry) (5).
